query:
ALTER TABLE experts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS specialties JSON DEFAULT '[]',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS languages VARCHAR(200) DEFAULT '中文',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS consultationModes JSON DEFAULT '["video"]',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS socialLinks JSON DEFAULT '{}',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceMin INT DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priceMax INT DEFAULT 0;
